title: Clean Heat Market Mechanism: heat pump installation certification scheme
body: "From 12 December 2025, the Microgeneration Certification Scheme’s (MCS) new redeveloped scheme (“MCS:2025”) is approved as a certification scheme under the Clean Heat Market Mechanism (CHMM).  Further details are available from Microgeneration Certification Scheme: Redeveloped installer scheme.  Installations carried out under the current MCS scheme will continue to be awarded CHMM credits during a transitional period until installers and certification bodies have all transitioned to MCS:2025.  "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
